statement: Canonical code substrate: repo github.com/christianpiatt-jpg/clarityos-runtime.git, branch main, pinned at HEAD d8e44baad2445c8c6f451d35427c2521c12dbdbd.

Canonical Continuity Snapshot Store. The ClarityOS continuity snapshot store lives at ops/snapshots/ in the clarityos-runtime repository as append-only timestamped JSONL files on signed commits. Plane = Option C: git canonical + Firestore read-only projection. Runtime dashboards read the Firestore mirror; CT-3 compiles continuity state from git or mirror; the mirror is idempotently regenerable from git HEAD. Write authority: ET-1.W primary / ET-1.C alternate / COW-1-directed ET-1, with CT-1 authoring identity. Commit discipline: scoped git add -f ops/snapshots/<file> only — never git add -A. Signing required. Append-only enforcement: discipline initially, hook/rules to follow.
evidence: Dockerfile:14-19 COPY allowlist excludes ops/ (repo-plane, not runtime image)

statement: Canonical ledger substrate (Option C): append-only JSONL ledger at ops/ledger/ in the clarityos-runtime repository; git canonical + Firestore read-only projection; mirror idempotently regenerable from git HEAD; not runtime-authoritative. Commit discipline: scoped git add -f ops/ledger/<file> only — never git add -A. Signing required. Append-only enforcement: discipline initially, hook/rules to follow.
evidence: Dockerfile:14-19 COPY allowlist excludes ops/ (repo-plane, not runtime image)
